card.desc: The detailed pricing for each trip is located on the accommodation page as the only variables within a trip are the room choices. Therefore the prices for each trip are itemised only on the accommodation page. Ideally the accommodation pages would be able to shared between the multiple trips that use them. However, the pricing will vary. Is there a way you can think of to remedy this? The slugs may get unwieldy and the content will be replicated multiple times otherwise.

data.text:
Hey @alicetodd

Yes you can – if you type **mailto:**[**alice@swimquest.uk.com**](mailto:alice@swimquest.uk.com "‌") into the URL field, the button will open a new email with the recipient email address populated.

I’ve added in a test example on this page for you to see in the CMS [https://swimquest.benmeyer.digital/wp-admin/post.php?post=2150&action=edit](https://swimquest.benmeyer.digital/wp-admin/post.php?post=2150&action=edit "‌")
